creator: pyrus@bsdmail.com
text:
Created attachment 243366
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy4/data/124i386-quarterly/6777c48daefc/logs/libxaw3dxft-1.6.2.h.log

I got reports in my email that x11-toolkits/libxaw3dxft wouldn't build a package.

It might be the documentation configuration that causes it. Here are the reports.

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy4/data/124i386-quarterly/6777c48daefc/logs/libxaw3dxft-1.6.2.h.log

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy4/build.html?mastername=124i386-quarterly&build=6777c48daefc

There was a make checksum error in the report. Contents from one of those links is also below.

I'm the maintainer, but I'm unable to fix this at this time. If someone can fix it, go ahead, rather than wait for a timeout. If someone wants to maintain it, that's also ok by me. I realize this package is important for some.
